title: Tangy Creamy Russian Minced Steak Pierogi
description: A show-off Russian dish featuring lean minced steak, wrapped in a delicate leaf and steamed to perfection. This recipe is low in calories and perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Combine minced beef, saut0ed onions, flour, salt, black pepper, and sugar in a large bowl.
Mix in sour cream, chopped fresh dill, and eggs until just combined.
Knead the mixture for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the mixture into 12 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a ball and flatten slightly into a disk shape.
Place a disk of dough wrapper in the center of each ball of filling.
Fold the dough wrapper over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press edges to seal.
Repeat with remaining dough and filling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pierogi for 5 minutes or until they float to the surface.
Serve with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of chopped fresh dill.
Optional: pan-fry the pierogi in butter until golden brown on both sides.
